summary: Completed comprehensive testing of paper reading web app with AI-powered contextual word lookup. Backend APIs fully functional (11/11 tests passed). Frontend mostly working with critical paragraph formatting issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue:
Paragraph-based rendering not working correctly - multi-paragraph text displays as single continuous paragraph instead of separate

elements
ui_bugs.details: Expected 4 paragraphs from test content with double newlines, but only 1 paragraph element rendered. Text flows continuously without paragraph breaks.

integration_issues.issue: DOM element detachment error when closing explanation panel after bookmarking
Navigation back to Papers from Bookmarks page timeout - nav-papers selector not found

passed_tests: Homepage loading with hero title and navigation
Upload form with title input and tabs
Word clicking and explanation panel display
Caching with 'Instant' badge on repeat clicks
PDF upload tab with dropzone and required asterisk
Multiple bookmarked explanations visible on Saved page
action_item_for_main_agent:
Fix paragraph-based rendering in PaperReader.jsx - text with double newlines (\n\n) should render as separate

elements, not as one continuous paragraph. Also fix DOM element detachment issues in explanation panel navigation.
